text: Being here, I am struck by a sense of curiosity mixed with unease. The dim lighting, glass barriers, and reflective screens make the environment feel both modern and isolating. The presence of R+D and mention of intelligent machines on the wall reminds me that I am standing in a space dedicated to technological exploration. I feel cautious but intrigued, anticipating what I might learn or experience—but also wary of the unfamiliar atmosphere. The silence and emptiness amplify my self-awareness, making me reflect on my place in this evolving, digital world.
